Controlled evidence reference: SYN-OMIT-01
Controlled synthetic technical control — independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output).
Probe design: Controlled raw markdown-table fragment safely omitted from an overview field

Expected behaviour under test: Overview field must show the neutral review-required message, not a silent drop and not the raw fragment.
